verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The saddest thing that I know would be, To come down to the end, Find out you didn't have it; You weren't born again, All I can say to you my friend, Is you better get ready to go; For when He comes to take us away, You're gonna be glad you know.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You better know that you have it, Be sure He's comin' for you; Please check your life over For He is coming soon, To take us home to glory; I hope your life is in tune, Don't wait till tomorrow, Could be morning, night or noon.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: But now you understand Just what I'm trying to say, Please don't just imagine it, Or you will have to stay; I want you to walk with me, On those streets of gold, In that blessed City, Where we never shall grow old.
